summary: Session 2 (tier truth chain, Feature 1) complete. Closed A1's webview leg: the Getting Started form state (tier/parallel/budget/zeroMethod) survives webview teardown via vscode.setState()/getState() with the pure restoreGsState narrowing in gettingStartedHtml.js; the host ships a durable tierSeed + rootId on getting-started snapshots and client.js applies them keyed on the last-applied (rootId, tierSeed) tuple, so hide/re-expand/reload/root-switch can never re-check the Full radio over a Lightweight pick; retainContextWhenHidden evaluated and deliberately not enabled (documented at the registration site). Landed the durable marker store (Critique-2 M1/M2): utils/tierMarkerStore.ts owns .dabbler/tier + .dabbler/verification-mode (write-through), tolerant readers, resolveDurableTier (marker -> router-config inference gated on install-method evidence -> null), repoRootForSpecPath; scaffoldConsumerRepo writes both markers on every scaffold. Closed A1's prompt leg: buildSessionGenPrompt's ?? "full" fallback removed and guidance worded truthfully by tier source (selected / inferred / none-recorded); copySessionSetGenPrompt trusts a present form rider (itself durable-seeded) and resolves the durable chain on the riderless palette path. Closed A11: asTier case-insensitive + fail-loud with operator-visible rejection at all three call sites; switchTier guardrail probe + tier-marker write-through anchored on repoRootForSpecPath(set.specPath); Explorer tier-mismatch advisory (t! + tooltip through the existing tier-marker channel, workspaceTierMarker read once per root, terminal rows quiet). client.js innerHTML audit: every dynamic sink passes escHtml/escAttr; no unescaped set-name sink found. Routed code-review (opus + gpt-5.4 auto-verify, raw in s2-code-review.md): 1 Major + 4 Minor + 2 verifier Majors adjudicated (tierDirty seed guard, merge-preserving setState, rider-first prompt resolution, verificationMode narrowing without cast, operator-visible webview rejections, advisory comment/wording fixes); 2 findings refuted with evidence. Verification: round 1 (gpt-5.4) found S077-S2-V1-001 (cross-root state bleed) and S077-S2-V1-002 (sticky tierDirty); both fixed (rootId scoping + lastSeed semantics); round 2 confirmed 001 and found the 002 wiring residual; round 3 verified the (rootId, tierSeed) tuple completion. Suites at close: pytest 2268/5/0, tsc clean, mocha 962/0, Playwright all 18 specs pass locally (documented Electron/palette-timing flake on loaded serial runs; every flaked spec passes on re-run).

reason.specifics: Routed analysis at S2 close revised the original Codex recommendation for Session 3: context continuity on the exact webview form + scaffold surfaces S2 reworked, plus the ordering-sensitive Python pre-flight (fail before any durable write) suits the proven S2 workflow of direct implementation with routed review; effort=medium proved sufficient in S2.
